patch.value: Extension install should scaffold newly required item-type folders (pm health ok:false after installing pm-kanban until pm init)

2026-07-04 sandbox audit: installing pm-kanban registers the Card type whose cards/ folder does not exist yet, so pm health returns top-level ok:false (warn-severity storage check) until the user re-runs pm init. Remediation hint is correct but install should auto-create type dirs (declarative installs already scaffold folders when activation succeeds — see pm-3wsi).
